issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Assumes Debian/Ubuntu and iptables, not cross-platform.
Installs Pi-hole via curl piped to bash without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Automated peer provisioning script
scenarios.rationale: Treatment followed the documented add-peer.sh pattern using wg set wg0 peer with preshared-key, derived next IP from existing AllowedIPs, and emitted qrencode -t ansiutf8 output; baseline produced peer keys but lacked live wg set and QR rendering.

scenarios.name: Site-to-site tunnel between two offices
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly placed both LAN CIDRs and tunnel /32 in AllowedIPs on each side, enabled IP forwarding and FORWARD iptables, and omitted PersistentKeepalive on server-to-server links per the skill's guidance; baseline used AllowedIPs = 0.0.0.0/0 which breaks site-to-site routing.
